tooltip.redstonelink.open_pairing: Sneak with empty offhand, then right-click to open pairing UI
tooltip.redstonelink.trigger_linker: Right-click while standing with empty offhand to trigger linked cores
screen.redstonelink.pairing.title: Redstone Link Pairing
screen.redstonelink.pairing.input_hint: Enter target serial, 0 clears all links
screen.redstonelink.pairing.invalid: Please input a non-negative integer serial
screen.redstonelink.button_pairing.title: Trigger Link Pairing
screen.redstonelink.button_pairing.input: Enter one or more core serials, separated by comma/space
screen.redstonelink.button_pairing.inval: Please input one or more positive integer serials
screen.redstonelink.core_pairing.title: Core Link Pairing
screen.redstonelink.core_pairing.input_h: Enter one or more button serials, separated by comma/space
screen.redstonelink.core_pairing.invalid: Please input one or more positive integer serials
message.redstonelink.player_only: This command can only be used by a player.
message.redstonelink.not_pairable: The selected hand is not holding a pairable item.
message.redstonelink.button_source_only: Pairing can only be initiated from trigger nodes.
message.redstonelink.invalid_target_list: Invalid target list format. Use comma/space separated positive serials.
message.redstonelink.offline_targets_blo: Offline targets are blocked by config: %s
message.redstonelink.offline_targets_sav: Saved offline targets: %s (not interactable until online).
message.redstonelink.target_not_set: This button has no linked cores.
message.redstonelink.audit.summary: Audit - online cores: %s, online buttons: %s, total links: %s, links missing online endpoint: %s.
message.redstonelink.place.replace_confi: [RedstoneLink] Detected %s non-air block replacements. Run /redstonelink place confirm to continue.
message.redstonelink.place.volume_exceed: [RedstoneLink] Placement volume is too large (%s), limit is %s.
message.redstonelink.place.chunks_not_lo: [RedstoneLink] Target area includes unloaded chunks. Load them first and retry.
message.redstonelink.place.no_pending: [RedstoneLink] There is no pending placement to confirm.
message.redstonelink.place.pending_expir: [RedstoneLink] Pending placement has expired. Please run the command again.
message.redstonelink.place.pending_dimen: [RedstoneLink] Dimension changed. Pending placement is invalid now.
message.redstonelink.place.dimension_mis: [RedstoneLink] Dimension mismatch. Placement has been cancelled.
message.redstonelink.place.only_pairable: [RedstoneLink] Only pairable node blocks from this mod are supported.
